sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Latest GBNY News - Generations Bancorp NY, Inc. Announces Volu...
feed.summary: This article compiles news regarding Generations Bancorp NY, Inc. (GBNY), featuring announcements about its voluntary Nasdaq delisting and SEC deregistration, and the acquisition of Generations Bank by ESL Federal Credit Union. It also includes past news on leadership appointments and retirements within the company. Each news item is accompanied by a Rhea-AI summary, sentiment analysis, and end-of-day stock performance.

feed.title: SLB And Rockwell Automation Complete Sensia Joint Venture Dissolution
feed.summary: SLB and Rockwell Automation have finalized the dissolution of their Sensia joint venture, reallocating its business units between the two companies. SLB now owns Sensia’s Lift Control, Measurement, Digital Solutions, and Edge Application businesses to enhance its energy sector offerings. Rockwell Automation has fully acquired Sensia’s Process Automation and vMonitor products business, streamlining its portfolio.

feed.title: Teledyne Increases Focus on Space Technologies | Business | Apr 2026
feed.summary: Teledyne Technologies has consolidated its space-focused businesses under a new brand, Teledyne Space, to enhance its commitment to the global space sector. This integration aims to streamline the delivery of advanced space technologies by combining expertise in sensing, electronics, components, and mission-critical operations. Teledyne Space will exhibit its integrated capabilities at the upcoming 2026 Space Symposium, showcasing its role in major space missions for over five decades.

feed.title: Genius Group (GNS) Stock: Jumps 8% as Revenue Surges 171% and Profit Turns Positive
feed.summary: Genius Group (GNS) stock rose over 8% after reporting strong Q1 2026 operational results, with revenue surging 171% to $3.3 million and the company returning to profitability with a net operating profit of $2.7 million. The educational company also cleared its outstanding debt by selling its remaining Bitcoin holdings, improving its balance sheet stability. Furthermore, Genius Group expanded its education-focused strategy by launching its Genius School model in Bali and enhancing its AI-powered training programs.

feed.title: What's Going On With Lockheed Martin Stock Thursday? - Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT)
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin's Orion spacecraft recently launched the Artemis II mission, signifying a critical step in NASA's plan to return humans to the Moon. While the stock shows short-term weakness, with its MACD signaling potential downward pressure, it maintains a strong intermediate to long-term trend and robust 12-month performance. Analysts currently hold a consensus "Hold" rating, with varying price targets, ahead of Lockheed Martin's upcoming Q1 2026 earnings release.

feed.title: Mercury Systems wins contract for satellite data recorders from L3Harris
feed.summary: Mercury Systems has secured a contract from L3Harris Technologies to provide solid-state data recorders for the U.S. Space Development Agency's Tranche 3 Tracking Layer satellite constellation. These recorders will be used in satellites designed to detect advanced missile threats as part of the SDA Proliferated Warfighter Space Architecture. Mercury's radiation-tolerant data recorders are already deployed across various tranches of this program, and for Tranche 3, L3Harris selected Mercury's highest-capacity recorder.

feed.title: GCT Semiconductor (GCTS) director granted 24,122 RSUs vesting in 2026
feed.summary: GCT Semiconductor director Robert Barker was granted 24,122 restricted stock units (RSUs) as an equity award, with no cash cost per share. These RSUs are scheduled to vest on March 31, 2026, provided Mr. Barker remains in service. Following this grant, his direct holdings in GCT Semiconductor now total 142,451 shares.

feed.title: Director at GCT Semiconductor (NASDAQ: GCTS) granted 24,122 RSUs
feed.summary: GCT Semiconductor director Hyunsoo Shin received a grant of 24,122 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) as equity compensation on March 31, 2026, under the GCT 2024 Omnibus Incentive Compensation Plan. The RSUs, valued at $27,500 based on a fair market value of $1.14 per share, will vest on March 31, 2026, subject to continued service. Following this grant, Shin directly holds 804,809 shares of common stock.

feed.title: Moody's will post quarterly results before markets open April 22
feed.summary: Moody's Corporation (NYSE: MCO) is scheduled to release its first-quarter 2026 financial results before the NYSE trading opens on Wednesday, April 22, 2026. The company will host a teleconference at 9:00 a.m. ET on the same day with President and CEO Rob Fauber and CFO Noémie Heuland to discuss the results and answer questions. The earnings release and presentation slides will be available on Moody's Investor Relations website.

feed.title: Coca-Cola ordered to pay more than $5 million after violating national food laws
feed.summary: Coca-Cola Israel has been fined over $5 million by the Israel Competition Authority for violating national food laws between 2021 and 2022. The company was found to have interfered with product display recommendations, consumer pricing for other brands, and made unsanctioned payments to retailers. Despite not admitting wrongdoing, Coca-Cola Israel accepted the consequences, leading to a reduced fine from a potential maximum of over $25 million.

feed.title: S&P 500 Surges on Trump Comments Hinting at Swift End to Iran Conflict: SPY ETF Leads Gains for US Investors
feed.summary: The S&P 500 and SPDR S&P 500 ETF (SPY) experienced a significant rally following President Trump's comments suggesting a rapid conclusion to the Iran conflict, boosting market optimism and lowering oil prices. Additionally, sector-specific catalysts, such as Oracle's AI focus and Eli Lilly's FDA approval for a GLP-1 pill, contributed to the gains. While the rally offers relief to investors, risks such as ongoing Iran threats and broader economic uncertainties persist, advising cautious but strategic positioning.

feed.title: Five straight record quarters set up Healthy Extracts for a bigger 2026
feed.summary: Healthy Extracts (OTCQB: HYEX) reported preliminary unaudited 2025 net revenue of $4.5 million, a 45% increase, driven by the Gummy USA merger, new product launches, and channel expansion, with organic operations growing around 25%. The company projects its new manufacturing facility could reach a $20 million annual capacity in 2026 and plans for a Nasdaq uplisting. These strong results follow five consecutive quarters of record revenue, setting the stage for further growth.

feed.title: Merck moves eye drug into pivotal trial for wet AMD vision loss
feed.summary: Merck has initiated a pivotal Phase 2b/3 trial for its investigational bispecific antibody, MK-8748 (Tiespectus), for the treatment of neovascular age-related macular degeneration (NVAMD). This trial, called MALBEC, will evaluate the drug's safety and efficacy against an active control. MK-8748 is designed to activate Tie2 signaling and inhibit VEGF, aiming to stabilize retinal blood vessels and reduce fluid leakage in patients with serious retinal diseases.

feed.title: Trimble to Acquire Document Crunch to Add AI-Powered Risk Management and Document Compliance to Trimble Construction One Project Delivery Ecosystem
feed.summary: Trimble (Nasdaq: TRMB) announced its agreement to acquire Document Crunch, a leader in AI-powered risk management for construction. This acquisition will integrate Document Crunch's AI document analysis and compliance automation into the Trimble Construction One ecosystem, aiming to enhance project management and ERP systems by identifying and mitigating project risks. The move is expected to help customers prevent costly errors, reduce administrative burden, and infuse contractual intelligence into workflows, with the transaction anticipated to close in the second quarter of 2026.

feed.title: S&P 500 Surges on Trump’s Iran War End Hopes: SPY ETF Leads U.S. Market Rally as Oil Dips, Gold So
feed.summary: The S&P 500 surged by 0.69% on April 1, 2026, driven by President Trump's announcement regarding the potential conclusion of the Iran war within weeks. This development bolstered investor sentiment, leading to a rally in U.S. stocks, including the SPY ETF, as geopolitical risks diminished. Consequently, oil prices dipped, while gold and other safe-haven assets rose.

feed.title: GFL Environmental (NYSE: GFL) boosts quarterly dividend by 10% for 2026
feed.summary: GFL Environmental Inc. announced a 10% increase to its regular quarterly cash dividend, raising it from US$0.0154 to US$0.0169 per share for both subordinate and multiple voting shares. This increased dividend will be paid on April 30, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 13, 2026, and has been designated as an eligible dividend under Canadian tax law. The company, North America's fourth-largest diversified environmental services provider, signals confidence in its financial position and cash flow with this dividend hike.
